coreIssue: This 1:1 is likely about whether the reorg has left your senior Engineering Manager overloaded, less connected, or under-supported in leadership spaces.
openingQuestion: How has the reorg changed where you feel most effective day to day, and where does it feel harder to stay connected or show up fully?
listenFor: whether she names a specific forum, meeting, or stakeholder group she has been opting out of
whether if she describes her week, it sounds like delivery work is crowding out leadership and team connection
whether she pauses, stays abstract, or redirects when you ask what support from you would reduce friction now
avoid: do not treat her pullback as a motivation problem before testing workload, scope, and support
do not rush into solutions or reassurance before she has named what has actually changed since the reorg
goodOutcome: You and Elena have agreed whether this is mainly transition load or a senior Engineering Manager scope/support mismatch, plus one immediate support change you will make now.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one concrete example of where she seemed less present in a leadership forum and one example where delivery stayed strong, so you can ground the conversation in observation without sounding vague.
